full.indicator_name: Poverty headcount ratio at national poverty lines (% of population)
full.source_org: World Bank, Poverty and Inequality Platform
full.methodology_note: National poverty headcount ratio is the percentage of the population living below the national poverty line(s). National estimates are based on population-weighted subgroup estimates from household surveys.

partial.indicator_name: Poverty headcount ratio at national poverty lines (% of population)
